'''nayuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldfieldthomasiid|oldfieldthomasiid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldfieldthomasiid|oldfieldthomasiid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nayuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næyizhith|næyizhith]] || [[word:næyizhij|næyizhij]] || [[word:næyizhish|næyizhish]] || [[word:næyizhi|næyizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nayuyuzhuth|nayuyuzhuth]] || [[word:nayuyuzhuj|nayuyuzhuj]] || [[word:nayuyuzhush|nayuyuzhush]] || [[word:nayuyuzhu|nayuyuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nayuzhuth|nayuzhuth]] || [[word:nayuzhuj|nayuzhuj]] || [[word:nayuzhush|nayuzhush]] || [[word:nayuzhu|nayuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nayufzhuth|nayufzhuth]] || [[word:nayufzhuj|nayufzhuj]] || [[word:nayufzhush|nayufzhush]] || [[word:nayufzhuf|nayufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nayuzhuthu|nayuzhuthu]] || [[word:nayuzhuju|nayuzhuju]] || [[word:nayuzhushu|nayuzhushu]] || [[word:nayuzhuku|nayuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nayuzhuth|nayuzhuth]] || [[word:nayuzhuj|nayuzhuj]] || [[word:nayuzhush|nayuzhush]] || [[word:nayuzhu|nayuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nayuzhuthul|nayuzhuthul]] || [[word:nayuzhujul|nayuzhujul]] || [[word:nayuzhushul|nayuzhushul]] || [[word:nayuzhukul|nayuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nayuzhuthuthu|nayuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:nayuzhujuju|nayuzhujuju]] || [[word:nayuzhushushu|nayuzhushushu]] || [[word:nayuzhuku|nayuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nayuzhuthun|nayuzhuthun]] || [[word:nayuzhujun|nayuzhujun]] || [[word:nayuzhushun|nayuzhushun]] || [[word:nayuzhukun|nayuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nayuzhuthuoro|nayuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:nayuzhujuoro|nayuzhujuoro]] || [[word:nayuzhushuoro|nayuzhushuoro]] || [[word:nayuzhukuoro|nayuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
